images.alt: Editorial cartoon for The last paper gave us a flat average, and a question it could not answer.: a precise average-slope ruler laid across a darkened tutoring scene under venetia...
images.caption: Starting point: Paper 2.0 ran a large factorial over AI tutors: recognition-theoretic prompts against plain ones, a single-pass tutor against a draft-then-critique ego–superego architecture.
images.section_heading: The last paper gave us a flat average, and a question it could not answer.
images.visual_metaphor: a precise average-slope ruler laid across a darkened tutoring scene under venetian-blind light, while the single decisive hinge of the lesson slips out of the ruler frame into shadow

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for Stage the lesson as drama, and the hinge becomes the whole experiment.: a tutoring desk lit hard as a noir theatre stage, three chalk marks on the boards lab...
images.caption: The reframe: A scene has three beats: a stuck point, a turn, and a recognition.
images.section_heading: Stage the lesson as drama, and the hinge becomes the whole experiment.
images.visual_metaphor: a tutoring desk lit hard as a noir theatre stage, three chalk marks on the boards labelled block, turn, recognition, and a checker stamp coming down on the third mark

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for The tutor must derive the next step, not recite the answer.: a proof drawn as a constellation of wired evidence nodes the tutor must walk a learner across, a...
images.caption: Teaching as a derivation: On this stage the secret is never spoken by the tutor.
images.section_heading: The tutor must derive the next step, not recite the answer.
images.visual_metaphor: a proof drawn as a constellation of wired evidence nodes the tutor must walk a learner across, a distance dial marked D ticking toward zero, the final node still behind a small curtain

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for Conduct adapts to structure, not to atmosphere.: a tutor wearing one frozen rhetorical mask repeated down a strip of film, a soft whispered manner-note only...
images.caption: The first surprise: Freeze the dramaturgy and watch the tutor's manner, and a rut appears: it falls into one rhetorical figure — the leading question, erotema — on 81% of turns, switching figure only about three times i...
images.section_heading: Conduct adapts to structure, not to atmosphere.
images.visual_metaphor: a tutor wearing one frozen rhetorical mask repeated down a strip of film, a soft whispered manner-note only thickening the rut, and a single index card naming the device that cracks the mask open

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for Move the critic inside the tutor, and the rule holds itself.: an empty director chair offstage in stage haze while a small lamplit watcher is installed insid...
images.caption: Relocating the authority: The load-bearing move was to relocate that authority into the tutor's own deliberation: a criterial internal superego with a single jurisdiction.
images.section_heading: Move the critic inside the tutor, and the rule holds itself.
images.visual_metaphor: an empty director chair offstage in stage haze while a small lamplit watcher is installed inside the tutor head, catching a third identical gesture in mid-air before it is spoken

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for The deficit was never response. It was detection.: a learner memory board with inked entries dissolving to smoke, one tutor who can see the fading marks reac...
images.caption: The learner who forgets: So far every channel we tried turned out redundant: the Sonnet learner was good enough that it already voiced whatever the scene made derivable, and our clever instruments measured nothing extra.
images.section_heading: The deficit was never response. It was detection.
images.visual_metaphor: a learner memory board with inked entries dissolving to smoke, one tutor who can see the fading marks reaching to restore them and a blind tutor beside an empty outstretched hand

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for The tutor authored its own reversal — and a one-step rule saved the scene.: a clue-release calendar pinned to a noir investigation board, the tutor pulling o...
images.caption: Handing over the calendar: Next we gave the tutor real authority over the release schedule, and watched a small, locally reasonable move turn fatal.
images.section_heading: The tutor authored its own reversal — and a one-step rule saved the scene.
images.visual_metaphor: a clue-release calendar pinned to a noir investigation board, the tutor pulling one card a single beat too early as a stage curtain drops, and a one-step repair tag stitching the broken thread back

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for Two guards. Three worlds. They trade places.: two hard-edged lanterns over a forked stage, one lantern reading the page surface and one reading the hidden de...
images.caption: Does it travel: Frozen into a fixed recipe, the tutor's pacing is unreliable: grounded just 4 of 10 across two replication fans — divergence, not convergence.
images.section_heading: Two guards. Three worlds. They trade places.
images.visual_metaphor: two hard-edged lanterns over a forked stage, one lantern reading the page surface and one reading the hidden depth below the boards, each bright over a differently shaped little world and dark over the other

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for A tutor that governs its own conduct — and a claim kept deliberately small.: a noir evidence wall with three pinned cards reading settled, scope-bound, and o...
images.caption: The verdict, with its edges marked: So the standing claim is the modest one: hidden-plus-proof-debt works; adaptive page/hidden selection is not established, and a next selector is not worth running until it can name, i...
images.section_heading: A tutor that governs its own conduct — and a claim kept deliberately small.
images.section_kicker: The verdict, with its edges marked
images.visual_metaphor: a noir evidence wall with three pinned cards reading settled, scope-bound, and open, and a heavy rubber stamp pressing the words dramatic form, not mind-reading
